2500753.title: The Hitman and Her
2500753.extract: The Hitman and Her was a British television dance music programme hosted by Pete Waterman and Michaela Strachan. The programme was produced for Granada Television and ran from September 1988 until December 1992 on ITV's Night Network. At this time, ITV was the only terrestrial channel to provide 24-hour broadcasting and The Hitman and Her was one of the first UK shows to be commissioned for overnight broadcasting. It was produced for Granada Television at first by Music Box Productions, then by Granada TV itself, and later by Clear Idea Productions through to the final edition.
